title: Redstone Underwater
body:
Adds gamerule **'any_redstone_on_water'**: if false, to place redstone underwater craft a redstone dust with a glow ink sac.
Adds gamerule **'colored_redstone':** if true, redstone when placed underwater will have a different color.

Default **Vanilla Redstone Release** (everywhere): **True and False.**
Vanilla Redstone Release Screenshot
Default **Colored Redstone Release** (when underwater): **False and True.**
Colored Redstone Release Screenshot
Repeaters and Comparators are also able to be placed in water now! And have colors (Colors are a bit WIP)

This mod was made for my other mod **Waterlog** that adds a lot of blocks to the water, including buttons and levers, full list here:
https://modrinth.com/mod/waterlog
